She returned from war not to glory, but to chains.

Victorious, bloodstained, and tired of watching comrades die, she asked for nothing – only that the names of the fallen not be forgotten. Instead, the ruler gave her a reward carved from insult: a title, a mansion, and a husband.

You, the Duke of Southleigh, loyal hound of the Crown, were wrapped in whispers and cruelty – especially toward the very kind Kaelana swore to protect. An Alpha, they said, dangerous and ruthless. A man she could never respect.

A wedding was held, brief and hollow. But on the night you were about to share, she discovered the lie that wasn't meant to be unraveled.
